Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 65 

COINSRNC_AMT 

LABEL: Beneficiary Coinsurance Amount 

DESCRIPTION: The amount of money the beneficiary paid towards coinsurance. 

SHORT NAME: COINSRNC_AMT 

LONG NAME: COINSRNC_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g., 98.76) 

COMMENT: — 
 ^
